description_long: This is a rectangular, upright juice carton with a predominantly white exterior and gold accents. The front displays the brand name 'FARAGELLO GOLD' in large gold letters, with a realistic image of a pineapple below, indicating the juice flavor. The top of the carton features a white screw cap set into a gold-colored panel, designed for easy pouring and resealing. One side of the carton is covered with detailed product information and a visible nutritional facts panel, while the other side repeats the brand name vertically. The packaging is sleek and modern, with a glossy finish that reflects light subtly, and the overall design suggests a premium pineapple juice product.
description: A white and gold rectangular juice carton with a pineapple image and a screw cap, labeled 'FARAGELLO GOLD'. The packaging is sleek, modern, and features a visible nutritional panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'FARAGELLO GOLD' label and a large pineapple image, with the cap visible at the top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the vertical 'FARAGELLO' branding and the gold top panel with the screw cap angled to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring detailed product information and a nutritional facts panel, with the brand logo at the bottom.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with vertical gold text and the cap angled to the right, showing the 'PREMIUM PINEAPPLE JUICE' label.
